name: Latte Project Configuration
description: AI coding rules and guidelines for Rails 8.0 + Vue.js 3 multi-tenant point of sales system

tech_stack.backend: Ruby on Rails 8.0.2, MariaDB (Trilogy), Devise, Sorbet
tech_stack.frontend: Vue.js 3, TypeScript, Inertia.js, Quasar, Tailwind CSS, Vite

quick_reference.multi_tenancy: All data scoped by perusahaan_id with by_perusahaan scopes
primary_patterns: Use Sorbet type annotations (# typed: true)
Follow Vue 3 Composition API with TypeScript
ALWAYS create comprehensive RSpec tests for new features

testing_requirements.model_tests: spec/models/ - Test validations, associations, scopes, multi-tenancy
testing_requirements.controller_tests: spec/requests/ - Test CRUD operations, authorization, tenant isolation

header_pattern.layout: row with icon, title on left, action buttons on right
header_pattern.icon: primary icon with text-primary class and q-pr-md spacing
header_pattern.buttons: Add button with fas fa-plus icon and color="primary"
header_pattern.form_buttons: Save/Cancel buttons with fas fa-save and fas fa-times-circle

search_filters.search_input: fab fa-searchengin icon with debounced search (300ms delay)
search_filters.filters: q-select with chips for category filters
search_filters.view_toggle: Toggle for table/card view where applicable

data_display.pagination: showing "X to Y of Z" text

form_patterns.submit: hidden submit input for form submission
form_patterns.layout: responsive grid with col-12 col-sm-6 classes

templates.controller:
# typed: true

class {{ModelName}}Controller < ApplicationController
  def show
    @data = {{ModelName}}.by_perusahaan(@current_perusahaan.id)
    render inertia: "{{path}}/show", props: { data: @data }
  end
  
  private
  
  def {{model_name}}_params
    params.permit(:field1, :field2)
  end
end
templates.migration:
class Create{{ModelName}} < ActiveRecord::Migration[8.0]
  def change
    create_table :{{table_name}} do |t|
      t.references :perusahaan, null: false, foreign_key: true
      t.string :{{field_name}}, null: false
      t.string :created_by
      t.timestamps
    end
    
    add_index :{{table_name}}, [:perusahaan_id, :{{field_name}}], unique: true
  end
end
templates.rspec_model:
require 'rails_helper'

RSpec.describe {{ModelName}}, type: :model do
  let(:user) { create(:user) }
  let(:perusahaan) { create(:perusahaan, user: user) }
  
  describe 'associations' do
    it { should belong_to(:perusahaan) }
  end
  
  describe 'validations' do
    subject { build(:{{model_name}}, perusahaan: perusahaan) }
    it { should validate_presence_of(:{{field_name}}) }
  end
  
  describe 'scopes' do
    describe '.by_perusahaan' do
      it 'returns {{model_name}}s for specific perusahaan' do
        {{model_name}} = create(:{{model_name}}, perusahaan: perusahaan)
        result = {{ModelName}}.by_perusahaan(perusahaan.id)
        expect(result).to include({{model_name}})
      end
    end
  end
end
templates.rspec_controller:
require 'rails_helper'

RSpec.describe {{ModelName}}Controller, type: :request do
  let(:user) { create(:user) }
  let(:perusahaan) { create(:perusahaan, user: user) }
  let(:{{model_name}}) { create(:{{model_name}}, perusahaan: perusahaan) }
  
  before do
    sign_in user
    allow_any_instance_of(ApplicationController).to receive(:current_perusahaan).and_return(perusahaan)
  end
  
  describe 'GET #show' do
    it 'renders the {{model_name}} list page' do
      get '/master/{{model_name}}'
      expect(response).to have_http_status(:success)
    end
  end
  
  describe 'POST #create' do
    let(:valid_attributes) { { {{field_name}}: 'Test {{ModelName}}' } }
    
    it 'creates a new {{model_name}}' do
      expect {
        post '/master/{{model_name}}', params: valid_attributes
      }.to change({{ModelName}}, :count).by(1)
    end
  end
end
